industry: Independent Power and Renewable Electricity Producers
name: GEPIC Energy Development Co., Ltd.
summary: GEPIC Energy Development Co., Ltd. invests in and develops new energy and hydroelectric renewable energy projects in China. The company also engages in the high-tech research and development; and provision of production and operation related information consulting services. It operates a hydropower plant with a total installed capacity of 1,476,700 kilowatts; a wind power plant with a total installed capacity of 803,500 kilowatts; and a photovoltaic plant with a total installed capacity of 8.6 million kilowatts. The company was formerly known as Northwest Yongxin Chemical Industry Co., Ltd. and changed its name to GEPIC Energy Development Co., Ltd. in December 2012. GEPIC Energy Development Co., Ltd. was founded in 1997 and is based in Lanzhou, China.
